paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.05, with a 2.02% change from the prior close and a -36.32% change over a 20-session window. There have been 2 new news articles in the last 24 hours.

Recent news headlines include "Fermi (FRMI) Is Down 19.0% After Director Exit Over Governance And $375M Convertibles Deal - Has The Bull Case Changed?" from simplywall.st and "Fermi (FRMI) Stock May Be Above Fair Value After Note Offering" from Yahoo Finance. These articles discuss the resignation of a director and the completion of a note offering.

There have been various SEC filings recently, including an 8-K form filed on July 15 regarding the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and another 8-K form filed on July 13 regarding the resignation of director Miles Everson. There has also been 1 Form 4 filing in the feed.
